metadata.falPrompt:
13th century Florence, Mercato Vecchio market district, 
street level. Crowded narrow market stalls, merchants, 
hanging fabrics, produce, barrels. Dense medieval Italian 
architecture pressing in on both sides. Warm afternoon light, 
busy but slightly uneasy atmosphere. Hand-painted illustration 
style, aged fresco texture, muted Tuscan palette — burnt sienna, 
weathered stone, tarnished gold. No fantasy elements, 
no modern details.
